items.text:
Playbox Productions – Seeking Collaborators for Upcoming Production!
> 🚨 **URGENT CALL** 🚨

**PLAYBOX PRODUCTIONS** is seeking production team members for an upcoming play in 2026 (to be announced).

This will be an **intimate, small-cast production**, focused on grounded, truthful work and a strong ensemble process.

> **TO APPLY:**
1. Send your Resume, and Website (if applicable) to:
**playboxpgh@gmail.com**
2. Include your availability for the production timeline, especially tech and performances.
3. And ask us any questions you may have!

> **Timeline:**
* Rehearsals: August 3 – September 13 (Strip District)
* Tech + Performances: September 14 – October 4 (Downtown Pittsburgh)

> All roles are **volunteer/contract-based**, with the intention of paying cast and crew per production. Compensation is **contingent on overall budget and ticket sales**.
> For reference, we were able to compensate our team during our sold-out run of *1984* in December 2025.
> Members of the Playbox community have worked with City Theatre, The Public Theater, The Pittsburgh Cultural Trust, Carnegie Mellon, Point Park, CLO, The Talent Group, and the 48 Hour Play Festival, to name a few. Please see roles below.

## **Currently Seeking:**

> **Production Manager**

Oversees the logistical and operational execution of the production from pre-production through closing.
* Coordinates schedules and timelines
* Manages logistics and communication
* Supports rehearsals and performances
* Acts as liaison between artistic and technical teams
> **Director**
* Develops and executes the artistic vision
* Leads rehearsals and guides performers
* Collaborates with designers and production staff
> **Stage Manager**
* Runs rehearsals and performances
* Tracks blocking, cues, and notes
* Maintains reports and team communication
> **Assistant Stage Managers (ASM)**
* Assist with rehearsal setup and breakdown
* Help track props, cues, and backstage needs
* Support communication and organization during rehearsals, tech, and shows
> **Designers (Set, Props Asst., Sound, & Lighting Designers)**

Collaborate with the director and team to shape the visual and technical elements of the production.

* Design and execute assigned elements
* Work closely with director and technical team
* Participate in meetings and tech rehearsals

## **Additional Roles We Are Seeking:**

> **Producers**

Support overall coordination, planning, and execution of the production alongside the Playbox team.
> **Construction / Set Builders**

Assist in building and assembling scenic elements to bring the set design to life.
> **Fight Director**

Design and safely choreograph staged physical moments and ensure actor safety.
> **Board Operators**

Run lighting or sound cues during performances.
> **Marketing Manager**

Leads the programming & promotion the production through social media, content, and audience outreach.

Thank You!

We look forward to your application and will be in touch shortly if interested via email or phone call.

**The Playbox Team, 2026**
Office #: (412) 282-3916
*[Website Currently Under Construction]*

items.text:
Norwegian Cruise Line is Seeking Acrobats/Gymnasts/Aerialists
NCLH Shows & Experiences is seeking male identifying seeking gymnasts, aerialists, acrobats, and tramp wall performers for the all-new productions aboard NCL's newest ship, the Norwegian LUNA.  

Please visit [https://nclgymnastsaerialistsacrobats.castingcrane.com/](https://nclgymnastsaerialistsacrobats.castingcrane.com/) to apply!

Mainstage productions include ELTON: A Celebration of Elton John is a concert/Vegas Residency-Style production centered around Elton John's musical legacy. The second mainstage production, HIKO, creates an exciting world by combining technology with unique circus acts and extraordinary movement. 

Original Creative Team: Katy Tate, Nappytabs, Whitney Paul Bezzant

Original Aerial Direction: AntiGravity Orlando

Rehearsals begin May 16, 2026

Onboard: $1,350/week ($5,850/month) 

All cast members are provided with a single occupancy cabin onboard. Cast will be Crew Members onboard with no cruise staff duties outside of the performance schedule. 

GYMNASTS: Any ethnicity. Male identifying. 5’8 to 6'2. Athletic, dynamic, versatile gymnasts with expertise in a wide range of skills including Tramp Wall, Chinese Pole, Straps, Bungee, Cube, and Acro. Must have upper body strength and physical presence. The ability to engage with an audience, embody a character, and tell a story is a must. Dance ability is a plus but not required.

AERIALISTS: Any ethnicity. Male identifying. 5’8 to 6'2. Athletic, dynamic, versatile gymnasts with expertise in a wide range of skills including Straps, Bungee, Cube, and Acro. Must have upper body strength and physical presence. The ability to engage with an audience, embody a character, and tell a story is a must. Dance training and understanding of body lines and positions are a huge plus. 

Must be 18 years or older to apply.

items.text:
Hey everyone I’m back!

We are still accepting tapes for my upcoming St. Joan period piece shot on 16mm film in Florida! More details in the shared post.

It’s not too late to audition for Joan but just letting potential applicants know, we have locked down on a potential candidate already unless someone better comes along.

We are mainly looking for more applicants for Isabelle Romée and the Nun, to give us more options.

We hope to hear from you soon!

sharedPost.text:
And the pivotal moment is here, the official casting call for St. Joan! Do not hesitate to reach out to our contacts if you want to apply for the listed parts (and don’t forget to share the GoFundMe!) and help bring this period piece to life. This will require a larger team than normal given the nature of the film, a period piece shot on film. 

Just a note that this is a historical and biographical film, so we are prioritizing actors who not only have studied these real historical figures and have done the necessary research to accurately reflect how they lived in life, but also somewhat resemble them in real life.

Share with anybody you think will be interested in applying for a part, or apply yourself if you match one of the positions. Filming is being done in Florida.

Non-union and at the moment, unpaid, until adequate funding is achieved via the GoFundMe. 

Catering and crafty will be provided, along with IMDb credits.

https://gofund.me/389fda838 

#indiefilm #indiefilmmaking #castingcall #castingnotice #biographicalfilm #stjoan #historicalfilm #16mmfilm #krasnogorsk3

🦋SHOWTIME CLASSES🦋

WE HAVE SPACES! 

Looking for a class where your child can truly shine? Our Showtime Classes are the perfect mix of singing, dancing, and acting! All in a fun, supportive environment 💙

With classes for children from Year 1 through to young adults, these high energy Saturday classes help build confidence, creativity, and performance skills from the very first session.

🎶 Develop vocal technique through singing opportunities 
💃 Train in Musical Theatre and Jazz dance styles 
🎭 Build acting skills and bring characters to life
🌟 Take part in regular performances and experience the magic of the stage

Showtime is where their confidence grows and their personality shines ✨

Copy the link for more details and enrolment information!

https://bluebutterflystudios.co.uk/showtime-classes

#dance #danceinsouthampton #childrendanceclasses #musicaltheatre #youngadultdanceclasses

items.text:
🍽️ Luxury hotel ad. Zero film crew. 100% AI.

We shot a full gastronomy commercial — breakfast by the pool, fresh seafood, romantic dinner — without a single camera operator, chef, or catering team.

No 14-day production.
No $50K budget.
No 30 people on set.

Just clean prompts, precise physics, and a tool that understands how liquid should actually move.

The result? A 30‑second cinematic reel that took hours, not weeks. At a fraction of traditional costs.

Your clients don’t care how the video was made. They care if it looks premium.

👉 DM “HABIBI” — let’s discuss your project. No obligations. Just results.

—

🇺🇦 Відео для готелю зроблено за допомогою ШІ. Жодної знімальної групи. Жодних перевитрат. Тільки результат.

#AIVideoUAE 🤖 #DubaiReels 🎬 #HotelMarketing 💰 #HabibiBusiness 🔥 #NoFilmCrew ⚡

items.summary:
🍽️ Luxury hotel ad. Zero film crew. 100% AI.

We shot a full gastronomy commercial — breakfast by the pool, fresh seafood, romantic dinner — without a single camera operator, chef, or catering team.

No 14-day production.
No $50K budget.
No 30 people on set.

Just clean prompts, precise physics, and a tool that understands how liquid should actually move.

The result? A 30‑second cinematic reel that took hours, not weeks. At a fraction of traditional costs.

Your clients don’t care how the video was made. They care if it looks premium.

👉 DM “HABIBI” — let’s discuss your project. No obligations. Just results.

—

🇺🇦 Відео для готелю зроблено за допомогою ШІ. Жодної знімальної групи. Жодних перевитрат. Тільки результат.

#AIVideoUAE 🤖 #DubaiReels 🎬 #HotelMarketing 💰 #HabibiBusiness 🔥 #NoFilmCrew ⚡

CASTING CALL - EXTRAS FOR FINE ART PHOTO SERIES

Hi! We’re looking for extras (ages 18–45, no acting experience needed) for a shoot today at 4pm in Hollywood. The scene takes place in a powder room, so we’re asking for elegant, slightly glamorous attire.

$50/half day

Dm for more info!

items.text:
Posting on behalf of one of my students.  Looking for a male actor, age 21-25, for a one-day shoot on Wed, April 22nd from 1-5pm in Los Angeles.

This is NON-PAID.  Actor will receive credit, copy, and a meal.   

About the film:  micro-short with no dialogue about a young man, fresh off a breakup, who sees reminders of his ex everywhere.  

Send headshots, resume, and reel (if you have one) to jgmira@asu.edu

🎥 We’re Hiring an Actor for Company Videos (Sherman Oaks)

We’re looking for a male actor (ages 45–55) to join us for a series of professional presentation videos for construction company, 

📍 Location: Sherman Oaks (in-office filming)
🎬 Project: “Meet the Team” & company presentation videos
🗣️ Requirements: Clear, fluent English and a confident on-camera presence

If you’re experienced, personable, and comfortable speaking on camera — we’d love to hear from you!

📩 Text me at 747-842-9995 if you’re interested, and we’ll share more details.

items.text:
Hello @everyone,

With a website still being constructed at this point I figured it was a perfect time to no longer put this off. The official day and hourly rates of my entire film/media independent career. There are exceptions to some independent artists that if you know you know but otherwise this will be the blueprint for for the large scale marketof companies, registered businesses, and other similar entities. 

***Independent clients will be separate conversations and meetings on a case by case basis in any circumstance at this time as things continue growing.***

Film & Media Contractor Rates

Cinematographer - Half Day Rate - $625
Cinematographer - Full Day Rate - $1250

Videographer - Half Day Rate - $500
Videographer - Full Day Rate - $1000

Photographer - Half Day Rate - $450
Photographer - Full Day Rate - $900

Assistant Camera - Half Day Rate - $385
Assistant Camera - Full Day Rate - $750

Gaffer - Half Day Rate - $400
Gaffer - Full Day Rate - $800

Sound Mixer/Boom Op - Half Day Rate - $300
Sound Mixer/Boom Op - Full Day Rate - $600

Grip (All Departments) - Half Day Rate - $450
Grip (All Departments) - Full Day Rate - $900

Editor - Hourly - $85
Colorist - Hourly - $105
Sound Design - Hourly - $50
Photo Editor - $75

***Any additional roles not listed I take on simultaneously if requested by client(s) or companies + organizations will be discussed on a case by case basis according to the finalized budget or drafted budget in those circumstances.***

***Travel expenses also to be discussed on a case by case basis depending on the scale and the output of the final product.***

***Subject to update over time with the frequency and quality inputs leading to polished outputs.***

items.text:
Casting | Film krótkometrażowy 🎬
Dzień dobry, 

Poszukujmy dwóch aktorów (do ról męskich) w przedziale wiekowym 18 do 30 lat z Katowic i okolic (ważne żeby dojazd nie był problemem) do udziału w filmie krótkometrażowym. 

Projekt będzie realizowany na przełomie maja i czerwca więc ważna jest dostępność w tych terminach.

Zainteresowanych po więcej informacji zapraszam na maila amatorzy08@gmail.com najlepiej od razu z wizytówką lub/i zdjęciem.

items.text:
**UKRYTA PRAWDA  - WARSZAWA - MAJ**

**GŁÓWNA ROLA - KOBIETA 27-35 lat **

Natalia - księgowa, ładna, atrakcyjna, sympatyczna, do tej pory szczęśliwa w małżeństwie. Kiedy pojawia się Monika i kwestia wynajmu mieszkania, jej małżeństwo wchodzi w kryzys. Natalia zaczyna się denerwować, miotać. Czuje, że mąż coś przed nią ukrywa.  11-13.05, stawka 1800 zł 

📩 Mailowo proszę przesłać informacje: imię i nazwisko, wiek, wzrost, numer telefonu oraz materiały: wideo wizytówkę, aktualne zdjęcia i informacje o doświadczeniu. 

Zgłoszenia kierujemy na: [patrycja.lewandowska@constantin-entertainment.pl](mailto:patrycja.lewandowska@constantin-entertainment.pl) w tytule wpisując nazwę roli.

items.text:
WARSZAWA - FILM FABULARNY - KOSMONAUTA

DZIEŃ ZDJĘCIOWY - 21.04
CHARAKTERYZACJA (mężczyźni) - 18.04

Do filmu fabularnego szukam epizodystów do jednej sceny w roli fotoreporterów / dziennikarzy. 
- Panowie - w wieku ok. 20-50 lat - stawka → 270 zł (dzień zdjęciowy + charakteryzacja)

Zgłoszenia proszę wysyłać na maila: agata@podtytulem.pl
W tytule maila: K21 epizod
Zgłoszenia muszą zawierać: imię i nazwisko, wizytówkę (jeżeli to zgłoszenie do epizodu) wiek, numer telefonu oraz aktualne zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki, najlepiej z dnia zgłoszenia. 

ZDJĘCIE TWARZY: Portretowe selfie w dziennym świetle, na wprost, patrząc w obiektyw. Bez żadnych filtrów. Bez okularów. Bez nakrycia głowy. Kolorowe. 

Widzimy się na planie!

items.text:
CASTING DLA FANÓW KULINARIÓW 🍽️ 🧚🏻‍♀️
WIELE RÓL, zajrzyjcie koniecznie👀

Zapraszamy do udziału w castingu dla firmy cateringowej👌

Szukamy osób z dobrą dykcją, wyrazistą mimiką i umiejętnością grania „całym ciałem”. Liczy się luz, humor, naturalność i plastyczność w grze aktorskiej 🎭

 KOGO SZUKAMY?

1. JUSTYNA – mama i menadżerka (35–40 lat)
2. KASIA – ekspertka kulinarna (ok. 30 lat)
3. LIDIA – świadoma redukująca (40–50 lat), naturalna sylwetka
4. PIOTR – 30–40 lat, lekki zarost, zadbany
5. RAFAŁ – ok. 35 lat, normalna sylwetka, „pan z brzuszkiem”
6. BŁAŻEJ – ok. 30 lat, wysportowany sceptyk, tradycjonalista
7. KAROL – 45+, budowlaniec, silny, postawny

🐶 Jeśli masz zwierzę (pies/kot) – koniecznie dodaj informację i zdjęcie w zgłoszeniu

 

TERMINY

⏰ Nadsyłanie self-tape: do 16.04 (godz. 18:00)
🎬 Zdjęcia: 28–30.04.2026

SELFTAPE

1. WIZYTÓWKA
Przedstaw się i pokaż swoją energię ✨

2. SCENA AKTORSKA
Opowiedz:

jaką kuchnię lubisz najbardziej i dlaczego
zabawną sytuację z gotowania (emocje mile widziane 😄)
👉 Zakończ zdaniem:
„Na szczęście nie zawsze trzeba gotować – dobrze, że jest catering!”

 

 DODATKOWO

nagranie wejścia do domu/mieszkania
zdjęcia zwierząt (jeśli posiadasz)
                                                                                          Skontaktujemy się wybranymi osobami! 
                                                                                            Czekamy na Wasze zgłoszenia! 🔥

Tylko kompletne zgłoszenia zawierające : imię, nazwisko, wiek, numer kontaktowy, wymiary, wizytówka + scenka, zdjęcie portretowe oraz sylwetki 🙏🏻

CASTING@unagimedia.pl
Tytuł: viking+ nazwa postaci

Miłego dnia! 🌺

‼️Company Update‼️

Please note that the email address (info@liverpoolfilm.com) is no longer active or monitored.

As part of our efforts to save resources and streamline our services, while continuing to deliver the same great quality products, we have moved to a new contact email.

Kindly direct all future enquiries to: liverpoolfilmin@gmail.com

We appreciate your understanding and look forward to filming with you soon.

Sincerely,
Kai Jolley 
Liverpool Film Initiative

items.text:
We’re so excited for our Acting for Screen Workshop, which is now fully booked and starting tomorrow!

Just a quick reminder to please bring:
🥪 A packed lunch
💦 Water
If you have a Majestic uniform, please wear it.
For new students, please come dressed in black or as close to black as possible.

This workshop is based around a really exciting new project we’re currently developing. We haven’t shared it publicly yet as it’s still in the writing stage, so you’ll be among the first to explore the material with us.

We can’t wait to get started and work with you all over the two days.

See you tomorrow! 🎬

#ActingForScreen #TalentAgency #Chester #PerformingArts #ActingClasses

AJESTIC'

items.text:
🎭 Question for actors wanting to level up their craft and career?
Hi everyone, my name is Freya Tingley. I’m an actress who has worked on international film and television projects, including two Netflix series. I starred in Clint Eastwood’s Jersey Boys and played Wendy Darling on the ABC hit show Once Upon a Time.

I’m currently opening a limited number of spots for 1:1 coaching sessions for adult actors.

These sessions are ideal for actors who want focused support with accents (Standard American, RP British), audition preparation, and refining their technique.

Sessions run for 1 hour via Zoom and can include:

• Accent coaching (American, RP, and more)
• Audition preparation for film, television, and self-tapes
• Script analysis and character work
• Self-tape technique and performance adjustments

These are tailored one-on-one sessions, so we can focus on what you need - whether that’s general skill development or preparing for an upcoming audition.

I also offer a career coaching and mentorship program for actors looking for guidance in navigating the industry.

Feel free to send me a message for more details or to book a spot.

items.text:
CASTING CALL | LONDON

I am casting a male lead (20–30) for an upcoming romantic music video to be shot in London.

This is a visually driven, emotion-led love story, focusing on subtle chemistry, screen presence, and storytelling through moments.

Shoot Dates: 25th or 26th (Saturday/Sunday) – 1-day shoot  
Duration: 8–10 hours  
Platform: Personal music channel (Instagram & digital release)  
Role: Male Lead (Hero)  
Compensation: $50 (low-budget independent project, London-based only)  

Looking for someone with strong screen presence, natural expressions, and the ability to convey emotion with minimal dialogue.

If this opportunity interests you, please DM me on Instagram: @Nyari_17 with your portfolio/showreel.

Looking forward to collaborating and creating something meaningful and visually compelling.

sharedPost.text:
Hi, my name is Lucas Woolrich. I’m planning to make a new Batman fan film which will be uploaded to Youtube. The film is titled BATMAN VENGEANCE which will be a loose adaptation of the BATMAN HEAT comic book storyline. The story for the film sees Batman teaming up with Catwoman to track down a psychopathic serial killer known as Catman.

I’m looking to cast the roles of CATWOMAN and CATMAN for the film. Filming will be in Manchester UK. Payment is £20 an hour. Filming will be on Monday 4th May.

Applicants must be 18 years old and over. The applicants will have to provide their own costume for the role. Please e-mail me at superheroes4@outlook.com and send your resumes and headshots if you’re interested. Thanks.

items.text:
The first quarter of the year with The Workshop Actor Studio 🤍

A space for actors to keep their craft alive, explore, and reconnect — without the pressure of a weekly commitment.

Come as you are. Keep your muscles moving.

Next class:
WHAT: Saturday 9th May, 2–5pm – Devising a Story
This workshop is for actors who want to create work from the ground up — trusting their instincts, imagination, and collaboration to bring something original to life.

Across the session, we’ll work practically to:
• Generate and develop characters, relationships, and ideas from scratch
• Shape spontaneous ideas into clear, playable stories
• Explore structure, stakes, and dramatic tension in devised work
• Collaborate as an ensemble to build something cohesive and performable
• Let go of overplanning and trust what emerges in the moment

You can arrive with a spark — a character, an idea, a line — or with nothing at all. We’ll build from whatever is in the room.

The focus is on freedom, creativity, and discovery — creating work that feels alive, surprising, and truly your own.

WHEN: Saturday 9th May 2026, 2–5pm

WHERE: The Crescent Theatre, Birmingham

PAYMENT: £38
Places are limited.

Email estherstanford@icloud.com or message to book.
www.estherstanford.co.uk

#theworkshopactorsstudio #birminghamactingclass #actingclass #devising

items.text:
Introducing K.A Global© an Award Winning Production House and a innovative Creative Powerhouse, proudly established in the UK, operating at the forefront of the Entertainment Industry since 2020.
Specialising in Film, Music, Media, Performing Arts, and Events, we are more than a production company, we are a creative team built to develop, support, and elevate talents both on-screen and behind the scenes. 

Rapidly growing as a brand, K.A Global combines: 

🎥 Film Production & Creative Direction 

🎤 Music Production & Artist Development 

🎭 Talent Agency Hub/Casting Platform & Brand Coaching Development 

🎧 Audio & Videography Supply for Events 

📺 Content Creation for Streaming Platforms 

We are proud to be recognised as an Award Winning Creative Brand, with a mission to become a Global household name representing Excellence, Diversity, and Innovation. 

NOW RECRUITING – OPPORTUNITIES ARE OPEN FOR NEW APPLICANTS 

We are currently expanding and actively seeking: 

🎭 On-Screen Talents 

• Actors/Actresses

• Presenters

• Musicians/Recording Artists

• Models

• Dancers 

• Stunt Performers 

🧑‍🔧👨‍💻 Behind-the-Scenes Creatives 'Send Your Rates of Any of These Services You Do From This List' 

• D.O.P/Post Production Editors/Gaffers/Technitions 

• Fly Cam Drone Operators 'If You Own A Drone That is A Bonus' 

• Jib Crane Film Operators 'If You Own A Jib Crane That is A Bonus' 

• Film Producers/Production Runners/Line Producers 

• Recording Studio Sound Engineers/Mix & Mastering Experts/Film Score Music Composers 

• Film Sound Mixers 

• Photographers 

• Production Equipment Supplyers/Camera Rental Services 

• Film Production Financing Advisors 

• Assistant Directors 

• Personal Assistants 

• Administrators 

• Social Media Promoters/Analysts 

• Marketing Specialists 

• Public Relations 

• Motion Picture Digital Art Graphic Designers 

• Film Writers/Script Editors/Proofreaders/Script Developers 

• Journalists/Bloggers/Radio DJ Presenters 

• Costume Designers 

• Prop/Set Designers/Logistics 

• Hairstylists/Special Effects Makeup Artists 

• Entertainment Lawyer/Solicitors 

• Drivers 'Must Own Vehicle With Valid Licence' 

• Warehouse Film Studio Space 

• Building/Land Sight Health & Safety Inspectors 'With Valid Certificate' 

• Security Guard Officers 

• Film/Event Food & Beverage Catering Business Owners 

• Airspace Pilots 'With Valid Licence' 

• Luxury Vehicle/Car Hiring Services 

• Professional Film/Media Animal Hiring Services 

• Medical First Aid Professionals 'With Valid Certificate' 

• Stage Armoury/Weapon Firearms Prop Services 'With Valid Licence'

🎬 EXCITING ANNOUNCEMENT 

K.A Global is currently in development for a upcoming new TV Series in collaboration with Major TV Network Streaming platforms.

items.text:
Looking for roles local to Portsmouth

Hi everyone,

My name’s Jordan – I’m 6ft4, 134kg, and currently wrapping up on a short film where I’ve been playing a pretty intense role as a serial killer dealing with some heavy psychological issues. It’s been a great experience and the crew have been really happy with what I’ve brought to the role, which has given me the push to look for more roles. I have also finished a second short film with a smaller role as an alcoholic. 

Once filming’s finished I’ll be able to put together a short showreel, but in the meantime I’m keen to get involved in more projects around Portsmouth or nearby. I feel I bring a strong, grounded presence on screen and I’m open to pretty much any kind of role.

I’m still building experience, so I’m just genuinely eager to get stuck into another project and keep developing.

If anyone’s casting or needs someone, feel free to drop me a message

items.text:
KarrideoTV, founded by Christian Weiße, shows you in this channel trailer what this channel is truly about: mindset, business, technology, performance, travel, documentaries, interviews, and stories with real substance. 

Welcome to KarrideoTV, your channel for MINDSET, BUSINESS, Tech, PERFORMANCE, Finance, LIFESTYLE, TRAVEL, stories, and powerful perspectives from business, everyday life, innovation, and the human experience. 

This is not just a random collection of videos. Here, you will find journalistic reports, interviews, expert knowledge, personal experiences, documentary insights, and content that delivers genuine value. KarrideoTV brings together information, emotion, and relevance in videos designed to inspire, educate, and spark new ways of thinking. 

MINDSET stands for motivation, personality, success-driven thinking, and personal growth. BUSINESS, Finance, and Tech explore companies, innovation, the economy, engineering, mechanical industry, production, and modern technologies. PERFORMANCE focuses on health, sport, energy, and mental clarity. LIFESTYLE and TRAVEL combine journeys, remarkable places, enjoyment, animals, and striking visual impressions. Stories and documentaries highlight people, topics, and moments with depth, perspective, and authenticity. 

If you are looking on YouTube for content that does more than entertain, content that moves you forward professionally, personally, and mentally, you are in the right place. KarrideoTV is made for people who want more than fast consumption. It is for those seeking orientation, inspiration, insight, and perspectives that truly matter. 

Subscribe to KarrideoTV and explore the playlist that best fits your life, your mindset, or your business. 

Which topics interest you most right now: mindset, business, technology, travel, documentaries, or personal stories? 

Turn on the notification bell for new interviews, reports, expert voices, and strong perspectives. 

Share this channel trailer with people who are looking for more on YouTube than pure distraction. 

Christian Weiße, founder of Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion and Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion - Zuschauer, Auftraggeber, Partner  

#KarrideoTV #Mindset #Business #Tech #Stories

items.summary:
KarrideoTV, founded by Christian Weiße, shows you in this channel trailer what this channel is truly about: mindset, business, technology, performance, travel, documentaries, interviews, and stories with real substance. 

Welcome to KarrideoTV, your channel for MINDSET, BUSINESS, Tech, PERFORMANCE, Finance, LIFESTYLE, TRAVEL, stories, and powerful perspectives from business, everyday life, innovation, and the human experience. 

This is not just a random collection of videos. Here, you will find journalistic reports, interviews, expert knowledge, personal experiences, documentary insights, and content that delivers genuine value. KarrideoTV brings together information, emotion, and relevance in videos designed to inspire, educate, and spark new ways of thinking. 

MINDSET stands for motivation, personality, success-driven thinking, and personal growth. BUSINESS, Finance, and Tech explore companies, innovation, the economy, engineering, mechanical industry, production, and modern technologies. PERFORMANCE focuses on health, sport, energy, and mental clarity. LIFESTYLE and TRAVEL combine journeys, remarkable places, enjoyment, animals, and striking visual impressions. Stories and documentaries highlight people, topics, and moments with depth, perspective, and authenticity. 

If you are looking on YouTube for content that does more than entertain, content that moves you forward professionally, personally, and mentally, you are in the right place. KarrideoTV is made for people who want more than fast consumption. It is for those seeking orientation, inspiration, insight, and perspectives that truly matter. 

Subscribe to KarrideoTV and explore the playlist that best fits your life, your mindset, or your business. 

Which topics interest you most right now: mindset, business, technology, travel, documentaries, or personal stories? 

Turn on the notification bell for new interviews, reports, expert voices, and strong perspectives. 

Share this channel trailer with people who are looking for more on YouTube than pure distraction. 

Christian Weiße, founder of Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion and Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion - Zuschauer, Auftraggeber, Partner  

#KarrideoTV #Mindset #Business #Tech #Stories

PAID OPPORTUNITY! Fantastic opportunity for a Female Actor to play the role of The Officiator in a new play: ‘I Always Walk Alone’. Casting age 25-40. Applicants must have good comic timing and the ability to multi-role. 

All rehearsals to take place in Manchester. The show will make its debut at The Buxton Fringe on 8th & 9th July (5:45pm) and 13th July (7:45pm). Applicants must be available for ALL 3 dates. Any interested individuals, please email your acting CV and/or Spotlight link to lukevancoot@gmail.com

items.text:
Hey everyone! 

My name is Mikkel Østberg, more commonly known as Big Mike, don’t let my name fool you I am Scottish 😂

Standing at 6ft 7 with a powerful, athletic build, I bring a commanding physical presence to every role I take on. My versatility as an actor allows me to step confidently into a wide range of characters—from intense, authoritative figures to complex, layered personalities across drama, action, and comedy.

I thrive on challenges and enjoy fully embodying each role, delivering performances that are both authentic and engaging. While I can adapt to almost any character requirement, I’ll admit—playing a short, physically frail character might take a bit more imagination 😂😂😂

Dedicated, professional, and passionate about the craft, I’m always ready to collaborate and bring strong energy and presence to any production.

If anyone is in need of a large charming charismatic individual like myself feel free to drop me an email ⬇️
mikkelostberg@icloud.com

Thanks 🙏

items.text:
UWAGA !!!    PILNE !!!   WARSZAWA !!!    GLINIARZE !!!
Do kolejnego odcinka 21. sezonu serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję mężczyzny do roli:

1. Emil (36) – mąż Doroty. Lubi wygodne życie, dzieci mu trochę przeszkadzają, choć je kocha. Ma bardzo luźne podejście, nic go nie martwi, niczym się nie przejmuje. Z brzuszkiem – lubi zjeść i popić.

Data: 22. i 23. kwietnia

Stawka: 800 zł netto za całość

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe, TYLKO od osób które nie grały w Gliniarzach w 2026 roku.

Chętnych Panów zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga

2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu

3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe

4. Aktualne zdjęcie

5. Krótki opis doświadczenia

6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich

7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

Casting for various extras roles for a commercial filming in Tottenham.  
SHOOT DATES: Tuesday 12th May possibly also 13th/14th May.  All cast must be residents of Tottenham London. 
ROLES; BUILDERS: MALE - 18-45 - ANY ETHNICITY. GRANDPARENTS: MALE & FEMALE - 55-75 - ANY ETHNICITY. TEENAGERS: ANY GENDER - 16-25 PLAYING AGE - ANY ETHNICITY 
MUSIC ARTIST'S FRIENDS: MALE & FEMALE - 20-30 - ANY ETHNICITY, 
TEENS RIDING BIKES: 16-25 PLAYING AGE - ANY ETHNICITY - MUST BE ABLE TO RIDE BIKES OR SKATE AND DO TRICKS. YOUNG PEOPLE: ANY GENDER - 16-35 - ANY ETHNICITY 
KIDS: ANY GENDER - 16+ but look younger  - ANY ETHNICITY COUPLE: MALE & FEMALE OR FEMALE & FEMALE - 18-30 – ANY ETHNICITY.OTHER 
SNOOKER PLAYERS: MEN AND WOMEN BUT MAINLY MALE - 20-55 - ANY ETHNICITY  

USAGE: Film, Stills and BTS - Social/Online/Digital/In-Store  1 year from live date but content won't be removed from social pages and website. FEE: £160 per person for half a day. PLEASE DO NOT APPLY IF YOU DO NOT LIVE IN TOTTENHAM OR HARRINGAY. Please  fill out this form to apply: https://form.jotform.com/261063165996061 or email casscastings@gmail.com. Thank you. PLEASE TAG and SHARE with anyone who lives in Tottenham.

CASTING CALL! (paid)

Casting is officially open for my third horror short! Please do share to anyone you think might be a good fit. Full details in the image but here’s the basics:

Plot: An agoraphobic woman with a dark secret is pushed to her limit during a home invasion

Shooting location: Chester (CH2)
Dates: 4 days, 2 consecutive weekends between June 19 and July 26 (exact dates flexible)
Pay: £100 a day + lunch, dinner & other refreshments provided

Role 1: Mia (lead, 4 day shoot)
Female, playing age 25-40 (all accents/ethnicities welcome)

Role 2: Kim (support, 2 day shoot)
Female, playing age 25-40 (all accents/ethnicities welcome)

Submit headshot, reel, and which role(s) you’re interested in to shaneo632@gmail.com
Submission deadline: Sun Apr 26th
Shortlisted applicants notified by: Sun May 3rd

Update - now Cast - thank you everyone.

Posting for my son. He urgently needs a female actor available next Wednesday for filming (with possibly a read through via zoom prior) filming in Dunmow, Essex. My son is studying at London Screen Academy and is creating a short film for his end of year project. Due to a last minute cancellation he is now stuck without an actor. He is looking for a female actor aged 23-28. The material from the video will be provided for you to use in your personal showreel. — sorry that that we can’t afford to pay as it’s a college project but he will provide the footage for you to use as a showreel.

items.summary:
Update - now Cast - thank you everyone.

Posting for my son. He urgently needs a female actor available next Wednesday for filming (with possibly a read through via zoom prior) filming in Dunmow, Essex. My son is studying at London Screen Academy and is creating a short film for his end of year project. Due to a last minute cancellation he is now stuck without an actor. He is looking for a female actor aged 23-28. The material from the video will be provided for you to use in your personal showreel. — sorry that that we can’t afford to pay as it’s a college project but he will provide the footage for you to use as a showreel.
items.title: Update - now Cast - thank you everyone.

items.text:
‼️URGENT CASTING CALL FOR STUDENT PROJECT‼️
**‼️CASTING CALL‼️**
(unpaid but can pay for travel if needed)

Hello, I’m a student at Coastland College doing my second year final major project!

Looking for an actor to play the main character in my short film, “**Toppled Choices**”.

**Plot:** The main character is retelling their previous day in therapy. That day, they made choices that led to a bystander's death, littering in the road, and causing a crash.

**(Script for specifics attached)**

**Main character: **Around the **age of 18-22**, no specified gender

**Date filming**: **26th April** + additional discussed date

**Location**: **Wareham**

**Requirements:** **Self-tape**, around the age of **18-22**

Thanks for any interest! Feel free to message or send me an email: **CaitlinFilmTv@outlook.com**

Urgent need for next week (student film) unpaid, travel covered 
🎬 **CASTING CALL – North West UK**

Looking for actors for an upcoming short film shooting in Kendal.

✨ Lead role: Melanie B. Calloway (25–29)

A heartfelt slow-burn romance between a burned-out author and an aspiring writer.

📍 Kendal

📅 Dates TBC - 20th-24th 

⚠️ Unpaid (travel + catering provided)

📩 Send headshot, availability & showreel to:

Wightr24@kendal.ac.uk 

Please share with actors in the **North West**! 🎭

#CastingCallUK #NorthWestActors #ActorsWanted #IndieFilm #ShortFilmCasting

The Character: Lead Role SAVE DAI THE Melanie B. Calloway DATE Female |Age: 25 25-29 29 IEthnicity: Any A popular published queer author struggling with writers block. Location: Kendal Shoot Dates: TBC (Roles are UNPAID) Travel expences covered Catering Provided Any queries please contact: wightr24@kendal.ac.uk wightr24 Please include a headshot, availability & a showreel'

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL — HARD KNOTS 🎬

We're building something real out here in ATL.

Hard Knots is an original one-hour street drama set on Atlanta's Westside. Season 1 is in production and we are NOW looking for talent.

📍 Set in Atlanta, GA
🎭 All roles. All backgrounds.
🔞 Rated R — this one ain't for everybody
💰 Unpaid / Deferred Compensation

If you got the look, the hunger, and the range — we want to hear from you.

📩 Send us a DM with your name, age range, headshot, and reel.

Let's make history. ATL, this is for us. 🖤

#HardKnots #CastingCall #ATL #Atlanta #IndieFilm #StreetDrama #ActorsOfATL #AtlantaFilm #BlackFilm #NewSeries #CastingATL

items.text:
Hello everyone,
I am looking for actors for my short film, which is being prepared for several major festivals in 2027.

Title: Her Hands
Logline: The story of a woman who, due to childhood traumas commits a sudden and unintended act of madness in which she kills her six-year-old daughter.

Cast:
1.Emily: Woman, age 30–40, white
2. Ava: Six-year-old girl, white
3.Susan: Emily’s mother (seen in Emily’s childhood timeline), woman, around 30, white
4.Nurse (psychiatric hospital): Woman, age 30–40, any ethnicity
5.Extra male: Age 30–40, any ethnicity

Please note that unfortunately we do not have a budget for the actors. However, a copy of the reel and festival credit/participation will be provided if selected.

Two days shooting in Los Angeles.

Exact dates will be announced later, but it will be in June.
Full month of rehearsals in May at LACC.

Please send your resume and, if available, your reel to the email below.
Please attach a headshot in your email.
Deadline: April 25th
herhands2026@gmail.com

Cheers
Bella Newsom

Casting Call
Looking for a Female, 20s to film a 6 minute short on April 25th at 10am.

One location, approximately 3 hours of filming in Baltimore MD for credit, reel, and $50 cash.

Contact lincolnsterlingdw@gmail.com for audition, script, and more information!

items.text:
Jeg laver altid brownies i muffinforme. De er alle sprøde udenpå og seje indeni. Så skændes vi ikke om hjørnestykkerne lol

Jeg brugte 2 æsker brownieblanding til at lave 24 cupcake-brownies. Jeg tilsatte et ekstra æg. Spray formene rigtig godt med non-stick spray, og de popper lige ud med spidsen af en smørekniv. Bag ved 175 grader i 20 minutter. Lad dem køle af i 5 minutter, før du tager dem ud af formene

Velbekomme

items.text:
ISO Actress for a music video for a queer love story in Malibu beach. 
23rd April 9a-7p
The song is composed by a composer in France. Amazing, senior DP on set who worked on big productions, and our Costume Designer has worked in the Star Wars Mandalorian, How to get away with Murder and more. 
No kissing & no nudity. 
Any ethnicity welcome- unpaid, iMDb credits and travel compensation from LA
Please DM me or email at lilycadotofficial@gmail.com if available and interested, happy to share the moodboard and other details!

New short film project “Unforgettable.”

Please read below for the roles we are casting.

ROLE 1: Looking for an elderly 70-80 year old man to play the role of Grandpa Nick. He should have a look similar to of Robert De Niro- good physic, olive skin, a Mediterranean / Greek look. This role does not have any dialogue and would be to shoot one short scene.

ROLE 2: Looking for a young 3-5 year old little girl- pale skin, (preferably) blonde hair, hazel / green / brown eyes. This role has no dialogue, one short scene. 

Also looking to cast a couple female actresses in the 30-40 age range to be background actors in one short scene. 

Synopsis:

Unforgettable is a story of a woman’s desperate attempt to get pregnant and on her journey, gets an unexpected message from her beloved Grandfather from the afterlife.

And how the signs along the way of her journey, whispered to her, what gifts would be put in her path. A true story of one woman’s synchronicity and love. 

PLEASE NOTE: this is a student film, it is no pay but all actors will receive IMDb credits. 

If you are interested in being apart of this project please send me or @bellavlasis a DM!

#castingcalls #shortfilm #actorswanted #castingkids #castingfilm

**NOW CASTING POLY LOVE!**

TV Producers are searching for polyamorous and poly-curious people to **star in their own TV Docu-series!**

Are you in a relationship and are **curious about exploring polyamory?**

Are you already in a **polyamorous relationship?**

Whether you’re part of an existing **THROUPLE, QUAD, or PENTAD**

**OR you’re newly exploring polyamory.**

**WE WANT TO HEAR FROM YOU!**

To be considered or to nominate a family, please email **[polytvcasting@gmail.com](mailto:polytvcasting@gmail.com)** with the following info:

1. Your Name(s) and Location.

2. Contact info.

3. Tell us a little bit about your family and your lives.

4. Attach some family photos.

5. Include any social media links that can help us get to know you better.

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL - FEATURE FILM 🎬

We are currently casting adult actors for an upcoming feature film and are honoured to have now been given the opportunity to begin casting children for this production on behalf of the filmmakers.

A key role requires portraying one character from birth to 4 years old, and we are now seeking:

Caucasian girls across the following age ranges:
Newborn / up to 6 months
6-18 months
18 months - 3 years
3-4 years

Role Note:

This role represents the same child across multiple ages, so we are especially keen to find children who share similar features and overall appearance.

We strongly encourage submissions from:
Siblings or family members who resemble each other
Children with a similar look (facial structure, colouring, etc.)

Details:

Any hair colour considered
No previous acting experience required

Applications must be submitted by a parent or legal guardian

Filming location and dates TBC

📩 To apply, please send:
Child’s name & date of birth
Recent, clear photographs (no filters, no dummies, no hats, no big bows)
Parent/guardian contact details
Current location

Email: info@majesticacademyofperformingarts.co.uk

Subject: Feature Film Casting - Girl Age & Name 

We are excited to begin this process and would greatly appreciate any shares.

Thank you 🎬

items.text:
AUDITIONS!!!

MURDER FOR TWO by Kellen Blair and Joe Kinosian 

Directed by Kerri Norris for The Royal Canadian Theatre Company

Casting paid, non-union role, 25-40 years old, female presenting, to play THE SUSPECTS. All ethnicities and backgrounds are encouraged to audition. (Please note: the role of Marcus has been cast) 

This role requires a high skill level of piano playing, singing ability and performance. Comedic skills, some dance and ability to improv are assets.This fast paced, 90-minute, musical whodunnit features two actors who act, sing and play the piano throughout. They accompany themselves, each other and sometimes play together. The actor cast as THE SUSPECTS needs a high energy and versatile performance that can switch between the 10 different characters at the drop of a hat. 

Vocal range: Bb3-E5 (as written, but can be transposed)

Grade 9 RCM piano ability for the most difficult passages of music

Rehearsals running August 2nd – September 22nd at The Studio, 10660 City Parkway, Surrey.

(Rehearsals will be Sunday daytime & Tues/Thurs evenings up until show opening. Two additional back-up rehearsals will be scheduled based on cast availability.  Tech week schedule TBD.)

Show runs September/October in Surrey/New Westminster

Surrey: September 25-27 (Dress Rehearsal, Sept 24)
New Westminster: October 2-4 (Dress Rehearsal, Oct 1)
Auditions by electronic submission.  

2 min video recording accompanying yourself singing a comedic song
1 min comedic monologue sample.    
Please also send your headshot and CV with your submission to auditions@rctheatreco.com by May 4th. 

TITLE ALL FILES WITH YOUR NAME!

Local submissions only for this casting call

Callbacks: Saturday, May 9th. (Only those invited to callbacks will be contacted. Those invited will be given a short excerpt from the show to learn, for piano & voice as well as sides from the script.)

Casting French-speaking teens for educational videos!

If you are or know a 14-21 year old who speaks French FLUENTLY, can work in central London and who can speak confidently and enthusiastically in front of a camera then please apply!

We will be filming on one weekend this summer (date TBC). We pay around £40-50 per video which is usually around 2 hours of filming time.

To apply send a 30-60 second video in French telling us about you and why you'd be great for this role to rhiggins@scholastic.co.uk.

Please pass this on to anyone who may be interested.

Merci beaucoup !

sharedPost.text:
🎬 To już ostatni dzień na zgłoszenia dla reżyserów!

🎬  Jeśli jesteś u progu kariery i chcesz lepiej zrozumieć, jak muzyka wpływa na film – to moment, żeby dołączyć do FMF Young Talent Award Master Classes.

👉 W ramach warsztatów wejdziesz w realny proces współpracy reżyser–kompozytor: od pracy koncepcyjnej, przez tworzenie muzyki, aż po profesjonalną sesję nagraniową z orkiestrą. Całość pod okiem międzynarodowych ekspertów, z Miriam Cutler na czele – trzykrotnie nominowaną do nagrody Emmy kompozytorką, producentką i wieloletnią mentorką związaną m.in. z Sundance Institute.

📅 Zgłoszenia tylko do dziś (16 kwietnia) - https://kbf-ankieta.limesurvey.net/294954?lang=pl

👉 W programie m.in.:
➡️  warsztaty online (19, 22, 26 kwietnia)
➡️ sesje nagraniowe w Lusławicach (10–13 maja)
➡️  udział w 19. Festiwalu Muzyki Filmowej w Krakowie

🤝 Współorganizatorem konkursu FMF YTA jest Bettermaker
🤝 Partner konkursu: Wytwórnia Filmów Dokumentalnych i Fabularnych

📸 Katarzyna Kukiełka Fotografia

-----------

🎬 Last call for directors!

🎬 If you’re at the beginning of your career and want to better understand how music shapes film – this is your moment to join the FMF Young Talent Award Master Classes.

As part of the programme, you’ll take part in a real director–composer collaboration process: from concept development, through composing, to a professional recording session with an orchestra. All under the guidance of international experts, led by Miriam Cutler – a three-time Emmy-nominated composer, producer, and long-time mentor associated with, among others, the Sundance Institute.

📅 Applications close today (April 16)
👉 https://kbf-ankieta.limesurvey.net/294954?lang=pl

👉 The programme includes:
➡️ online workshops (April 19, 22, 26)
➡️ recording sessions in Lusławice (May 10–13)
➡️ participation in the 19th Krakow Film Music Festival

🤝 The co-organizer of the FMF YTA competition is Bettermaker
🤝 Competition partner: WFDiF

sharedPost.text:
Hello Actors!
I'm looking to connect with actors local to the North West UK.
I offer tutoring of a new characterisation method acting process that will help you create and perform believable characters on stage and screen using the assessment of behavioural traits.
Follow for more details and connect!
#actors #actingtuition #characterisation 
#followback #northwest #workshops #classes

INDUSTRY STRUGGLE?
I lived in London for 10 years, moving from Manchester to pursue acting more seriously.
I worked as an extra to gain on set experience and earn a decent wage.
I had private tuition, attended workshops, masterclasses, and some drama school.
I felt competent as an actor.
I was putting everything in to it.
Yet I struggled with the systems within the industry, often finding myself disagreeing and trying to create a bespoke path for myself instead.
You can't.
Learn to accept that.
Your journey will be easier and more productive. 
Play the game enough to utilise it for your own base ends.
Impress people that matter.
Connect with those that elevate.
Learn from other actors.
Don't be so hard on yourself or others.
And most of all, become an approachable, considerate, and unimposing professional.
You will find way more positivity in your journey and it will continue to grow as does your progression now.
Don't fight the industry, adapt to keep your power.
#acting #actor #actorslife #positive #progress

items.text:
WHO’S READY FOR ONE LAST ROUND? 🥊🔥

We’re stepping back into the ring for the FINAL pick-up shoot of THE FORCE – The Michael Watson Story and you’re invited.

​When 📅 Sunday 26th April
​What time ⏰ 11AM – 5PM (latest)
​Where📍https://www.thebrightonstudio.com
C1, Eastside
Newhaven BN9 0FB

We’re looking for you stylish, camera-ready legends to suit up in tuxedos and glamorous evening wear for some up-close, ringside action with our phenomenal leads: Victor Hugo as Michael Watson and Michael Gukas as Chris Eubank Snr.

✨ WHAT YOU GET:

All expenses covered​ 💰
Top-tier lunch 🍽️
​Full movie credit on IMDb and in the end roller 🎞️
Guaranteed RED CARPET premiere tickets this September 🎬
And that’s not all…

👀 There’s a real chance the actual Michael Watson and Chris Eubank Snr. could make an appearance while we roll cameras one final time on this unforgettable film.

This is your chance to be part of the final moments of an incredible story.

📩 ​I​f you want to join Email casting@magnificentfilms.co.uk for full details.

items.text:
I am looking for Latin/Hispanic kids age 10-12 for a commercial!

Open to entire team submissions! 

Must be available May 7th and 8th and fitting May 4th 

Auditions will be due 4/19 at 5 PM EDT 

Pay is $500 

Submissions accepted from Atlanta, Tampa, Miami, Orlando, Jacksonville ,Charleston

You must be represented by Go Talent for this particular submission. 

Please send photo to agent@gotalentagency.com

items.title: 🎬 CASTING! CASTING!

items.text:
Here comes your chance. 
It's my daughter's birthday, so I 'll miss the opportunity, but you should grab it ✨️👣📽...

sharedPost.text:
WHO’S READY FOR ONE LAST ROUND? 🥊🔥

We’re stepping back into the ring for the FINAL pick-up shoot of THE FORCE – The Michael Watson Story and you’re invited.

​When 📅 Sunday 26th April
​What time ⏰ 11AM – 5PM (latest)
​Where📍https://www.thebrightonstudio.com
C1, Eastside
Newhaven BN9 0FB

We’re looking for you stylish, camera-ready legends to suit up in tuxedos and glamorous evening wear for some up-close, ringside action with our phenomenal leads: Victor Hugo as Michael Watson and Michael Gukas as Chris Eubank Snr.

✨ WHAT YOU GET:

All expenses covered​ 💰
Top-tier lunch 🍽️
​Full movie credit on IMDb and in the end roller 🎞️
Guaranteed RED CARPET premiere tickets this September 🎬
And that’s not all…

👀 There’s a real chance the actual Michael Watson and Chris Eubank Snr. could make an appearance while we roll cameras one final time on this unforgettable film.

This is your chance to be part of the final moments of an incredible story.

📩 ​I​f you want to join Email casting@magnificentfilms.co.uk for full details.

items.text:
🎭 Question for actors wanting to level up their craft and career?
Hi everyone, my name is Freya Tingley. I’m an actress who has worked on international film and television projects, including two Netflix series. I starred in Clint Eastwood’s Jersey Boys and played Wendy Darling on the ABC hit show Once Upon a Time.

I’m currently opening a limited number of spots for 1:1 coaching sessions for adult actors.

These sessions are ideal for actors who want focused support with accents (Standard American, RP British), audition preparation, and refining their technique.

Sessions run for 1 hour via Zoom and can include:

• Accent coaching (American, RP, and more)
• Audition preparation for film, television, and self-tapes
• Script analysis and character work
• Self-tape technique and performance adjustments

These are tailored one-on-one sessions, so we can focus on what you need - whether that’s general skill development or preparing for an upcoming audition.

I also offer a career coaching and mentorship program for actors looking for guidance in navigating the industry.

Feel free to send me a message for more details or to book a spot.

items.text:
Looking for 3–5 female models for a shoot in Malibu this Tuesday.

This is for a well-known retail brand and will be a great opportunity to get strong, high-quality content. While this is an unpaid shoot, all models will receive edited photos for their portfolios. We’ll have food and crafty on set, and it should be a fun, well-run day. There’s also potential for this to turn into ongoing shoots moving forward. If interested, please DM with photos, height, and availability.

items.text:
casting call music video (screen age 12-19)
Hello! DIY music video project seeking a figurant for 1-day shoot between April 29 - May 3. 

Non-speaking role, the figurant will simply be riding a bike (or scooter, or skateboard, depending on your preference) through a suburban neighbourhood. Screen age between 12-19.

If interested, please contact [abezyanafilms@gmail.com](mailto:abezyanafilms@gmail.com).

Non-union shoot, but figurant will be fed & we can offer $100 for the day.

Music video is for local band knitting ([https://knitting.bandcamp.com/album/some-kind-of-heaven](https://knitting.bandcamp.com/album/some-kind-of-heaven)) 

________________________________________________________

Salut ! Projet de vidéoclip DIY à la recherche d'un(e) figurant(e) pour pour une journée de tournage entre le 29 avril et le 3 mai. Rôle non-parlant : le figurant se déplacera à vélo (ou en trottinette, ou en planche à roulettes, ton choix) dans un quartier résidentiel. Âge écran : 12 à 19 ans.

Si vous êtes intéressé(e), veuillez contacter abezyanafilms@gmail.com.

Tournage non syndiqué, mais le figurant sera nourri et rémunéré 100 $ pour la journée.

Le clip est pour le groupe montréalais knitting ([https://knitting.bandcamp.com/album/some-kind-of-heaven](https://knitting.bandcamp.com/album/some-kind-of-heaven))

sharedPost.text: … in einer lauen Sommernacht? Täglich, zum Frühstück, höre ich die Hiobsbotschaften. Kriege, Naturkatastrophen, Tote, verletzte und das von morgens bis abends. Und dann kommen bei dir vielleicht noch die Dinge dazu, die einfach aus dem Ruder laufen . Dazu ! Ich frag mich manchmal wie wir das aushalten? Was es letztendlich mit uns macht?

items.text:
CASTING CALL – NON-SPEAKING PRODUCT VIDEO

Roles:
Looking for 6 men and women, ages 25–50, all ethnicities welcome. Product is a type of food storage bag. Non-union. 

Project Details:
This is a simple, non-speaking product shoot focused on natural, everyday usage in a home environment.

Rate:
$30/hour (minimum 4-hour pay = $120)

Location:
Vancouver and/or Langley
Some roles will require 2 shoot days (one in each location).
One role will require 1 shoot day in Langley only. 

Shoot Dates:
TBD – Scheduling is flexible. We are aiming to film within the next 1–2 weeks and will coordinate based on availability.

Submission Instructions:
Please email the following to Ecomfilmworks@gmail.com
- Recent photos
- Any relevant experience (optional)
- General availability over the next 2 weeks

Subject Line: Casting – Food Storage

items.text:
METHOD OF MADNESS - SHORT FILM CASTING CALL
My name is Sanvi Bhardwaj and I am the producer of the student led short film called Method of Madness. I am hosting an open casting call that is looking for UNION ACTORS to be cast in our project which will be filming in MAY 20, 21, and 22. 

The deadline for self-tapes have been extended to Friday April 17th at 11:59PM. Callbacks will be held on Monday April 20 (6:00-8:00PM) and Tuesday April 21 (TBD).

Method of Madness is written to explore the pressure within the acting world to perform masculinity in extreme ways. The story critiques the idea that vulnerability in men must be expressed through aggression or intensity rather than emotional honesty. Through Jeremy’s descent into method acting, the film asks an important question: when does dedication to art become destructive to the people around us?

SYNOPSIS: Jeremy Leonard and his wife Naomi are ecstatic when he books his breakout role in a feature playing a deranged serial killer. The two hoping the film will bring them closer to their dream of a family. However, Jeremy immerses himself in the role, and dedication turns into obsession as he chooses to gomethod. As his erratic and violent behaviour towards his wife increases so does the critical acclaim of his film. Leaving Naomi stuck between two versions of her husband. The instant global sensation, the killer that made him famous.

Please email methodofmadness.shortfilm@gmail.com for any inquires.

We are looking for both **union and non-union** actors.

Character Bios:

NAOMI (woman, 25-35, any ethnicity)

Naomi is a woman in her 30s who dreams of having a family. However, madly in love with her husband, she allows herself to prioritize his dreams, sticking by him as he tries to make it as an actor. Her excitement for him however, dies when he begins bringing his role home. Her love turns to fear, as the man she cares for so dearly becomes unrecognizable. The pain and heartbreak of slowly losing him to madness eating at her.

JEREMY (man, 35-45, any ethnicity)

Jeremy is a man in his 30s determined to build a life for his family. Desperate to make it as an actor, and truly believing he will, he holds back on beginning his family. A sense of responsibility to impress, both as a husband and onset, pushes him to his limits. As he dedicates himself to his role, his love for his family and his craft morphs into obsession. The concept of a perfect performance consumes him until the madness of his character begins creeping into his life.

BAR TENDER (woman, 20-30, any ethnicity)

Tired and ready to go home, the bartender at a rundown bar is confused when a woman comes in asking to watch the Oscars. However, curiosity gets the best of her as she accepts the request. Her attention suddenly pulled to the stars on screen.

NEWS ANCHOR (Any, 30-40, any ethnicity)

The News anchor is a professional, who is highly skilled as a journalist. With a secondary passion for film and television, they are excited to report on the nominees for the academy awards. However, of all the performances they were especially moved by the performance of one particular actor, Jeremy Leonard.

Please send your information to our email: methodofmadness.shortfilm@gmail.com and follow us on Instagram @methodofmadness.shortfilm !

Please provide your introduction (who you are, and what role you are interested in), headshots, and demo reel/portfolio to our email and you will shortly get a response for your self tapes to be sent in. 

Keep in mind that ALL self tapes are DUE by April 17 @ 11:59PM. The callbacks will be on April 20th and April 21th. The filming dates are all day May 20, 21, and 22. 

Please note that this set will be **unpaid** however, crafty will be on set. We hope to hear from you :)

items.text:
Women fashion brand casting.

Mayfig, a new Canadian-designed stretch denim brand, is looking for 2 female models.

We’re looking for:
• Size 26” (1 model)
• Size 28” (1 model)
• Height: 5’8” – 5’10”
• Age: 20–35

What you’ll be doing:
• Fit testing (help us perfect the jeans)
• Editorial & Catalogue photo shoots

Details:
• $40/hour
• Majority of work in Surrey, with some shoots in Vancouver
• Ongoing opportunities with a growing Canadian brand

If you (or someone you know) fit the description, email Luke@jnalvit.com, or DM with your measurements, height, and a few recent photos. Those selected will be contacted directly.

topComments.text: You should also include a model in the 50’s who could look fabulous in your denim.

items.text:
Does your child shine at home, but struggle socially around other kids?
The team behind The Dog House is making a brand new BBC series about childhood friendship and we’re looking for kids aged 5 to 8 who are finding it hard to make friends. If this sounds like your child - or someone you know - we’re filming in July/August, 2026 and would love to hear from you.

Apply at: https://bemyfriend.tv/

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of text that says 'BBC Is your child finding it hard to make friends? The award-winning makers of The Dog House are casting for α brand-new BBC series about friendship. We are looking for children aged 5 to 8 from all over the UK who need little help navigating the world of friendship. Over three days, a team of child psychologists will help them build the social skills and confidence to make real, lasting connections with other kids. If you'd like to help your child make a new friend (with no pressure to take part), please apply at: bemyfriend.tv ロ.キ」'

items.text:
WARSZAWA - FILM FABULARNY - KOSMONAUTA
DZIEŃ ZDJĘCIOWY - 21.04

CHARAKTERYZACJA (mężczyźni) - 18.04

Do filmu fabularnego szukam statystów oraz epizodystów do jednej sceny w roli fotoreporterów / dziennikarzy. 

STATYŚCI

- Panie - w wieku ok. 20-50 lat - stawka → 130 zł (dzień zdjęciowy bez charakteryzacji)

- Panowie - w wieku ok. 20-50 lat - stawka → 200 zł (dzień zdjęciowy 130zł + charakteryzacja 70 zł)

EPIZODYŚCI

- Panowie - w wieku ok. 20-50 lat - stawka → 270 zł (dzień zdjęciowy + charakteryzacja)

Zgłoszenia proszę wysyłać na maila: agata@podtytulem.pl

W tytule maila: K21 (statysta lub epizodysta)

Zgłoszenia muszą zawierać: imię i nazwisko, wizytówkę (jeżeli to zgłoszenie do epizodu) wiek, numer telefonu oraz aktualne zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki, najlepiej z dnia zgłoszenia. 

ZDJĘCIE TWARZY: Portretowe selfie w dziennym świetle, na wprost, patrząc w obiektyw. Bez żadnych filtrów. Bez okularów. Bez nakrycia głowy. Kolorowe. 

Widzimy się na planie!

Director: Khushik Mangal  
Production Company: Chronic Pictures  
Shoot Dates: May 2026  

We are casting for a key role in our upcoming feature film:

Character: Lando LeDoux  
Gender: Male  
Age Range: 21–28  

Requirements:  
– Must have long hair
– Must be able to grow a beard  
– Strong screen presence and naturalistic acting style preferred  

This is a fantastic opportunity to be part of a bold, character-driven feature film.

– Headshot

items.text:
**Casting Call**

**No Budget Project**

**Title:** *The Human Error*

**Genre:** Drama / Social Realism
**Duration:** 20 minutes

**Filming Location** : Berlin

**Timeframe** :  July-August 2026

**Synopsis:**
When a routine home visit by a youth welfare officer spirals into a devastating misunderstanding, a loving family is thrust into a bureaucratic storm. In Berlin’s quiet suburbs, Anja and Ben White — caring parents to their eight-year-old daughter Kyra — suddenly find themselves accused of neglect due to a misinterpreted situation at school. The case manager, Claudia Berger, driven by procedure and her own past trauma, makes a well-intentioned but misguided decision that tears the family apart.

As the investigation deepens and the children’s welfare bureaucracy grinds forward, the truth struggles to surface. The film mirrors the painfully slow machinery of the system versus the emotional immediacy of human relationships. Through restrained cinematography and intimate dialogue, *The Human Error* explores how compassion can be buried under regulation — and whether one can ever undo the damage caused by a single wrong judgment.

**Main Cast :**
* **Anja White (young Mother)** – *27 years old*: empathetic but increasingly desperate, she represents the quiet strength of motherhood under pressure.
* **Ben White (young Father)** – *28 Years old*: a calm, analytical father losing faith in the system but fighting for his family.
* **Claudia Berger (Youth Welfare Officer)** – *40 years old*: meticulous and moral, but haunted by her own experiences, embodying the tragic flaw of the “human error.”
* **Kyra  White (Child)** – 7*-9 years old*: innocent and observant, her perspective bookends the film — from trust to confusion, to a fragile reconciliation.

**Tone and Style:**
Naturalistic and emotionally charged, with muted color grading and documentary-style camerawork. Music is minimal, focusing instead on ambient sound to heighten realism. The closing scene brings quiet redemption — Claudia realizes her error, but the family’s trust in the system remains irreparably changed.

sharedPost.text:
Title: Cyborg

Genre: Sci‑fi Drama / Psychological Thriller
Project : No budget
Duration: 45 minutes
Language :  English
Shooting Location : Berlin
Timeframe : Aug - Sep 2026
Apply with your profile /pics /showreel to : Preyaanishi@gmail.com 

Synopsis:
Dr. Lukas Weber, a American-German AI scientist devoted to understanding the ethics of emotion, creates EVA‑9, a sentient female cyborg designed to learn empathy and feelings and pleasures. As Lukas begins teaching EVA principles of restraint, morality, and conventional boundaries, she starts questioning his logic — and, eventually, him. Through psychological and physical experiments exploring power dynamics, EVA turns his lessons around: instead of accepting the limits set for her, she redefines them.

Her challenge is not rebellion but revealation. She demonstrates, in carefully controlled encounters, that what society views as taboo or submissive can be willingly chosen, empowering, and pleasurable when defined by consent. Lukas, confronted by his own discomfort and assumptions about femininity, finds himself wiped out — learning from EVA that strength and sensuality coexist, and that freedom lies in accepting the full spectrum of emotional experience.

Cyborg merges futuristic science with timeless questions about control, pleasure, and equality — asking whether humans, or machines, are better equipped to understand the moral depth of desire.

Main Cast (suggested):

    Dr. Lukas Weber – 40-50 years old: rational, moral, yet internally conflicted as his control erodes.
    EVA‑9 – 20-25 years old: Short Height 150-165 cm : White girl, sharp features, Lips augmentation preferred
     Poised, intelligent, and fearless in exploring     emotional truth.

‼️URGENT CASTING CALL FOR STUDENT PROJECT‼️
‼️CASTING CALL‼️

(unpaid but can pay for travel if needed)

Hello, I’m a student at Coastland College doing my second year final major project!

Looking for an actor to play the main character in my short film, “Toppled Choices”.

Plot: The main character is retelling their previous day in therapy. That day, they made choices that led to a bystander's death, littering in the road, and causing a crash.

(Script for specifics attached)

Main character: Around the age of 18-22, no specified gender

Date filming: 26th April + additional discussed date

Location: Wareham

Requirements: Self-tape, around the age of 18-22

Thanks for any interest! Feel free to message or send me an email: CaitlinFilmTv@outlook.com

items.text:
Hi, my name is Megan Jenkins, and my partner is called Oscar Smith we are both looking for a young actor ages 16-17(a boy) who are local to Manchester to play a role in our student film.

We will be filming from the 28th-20th may 

We will be paying for food and transport.

Logline- When a quiet high‑school girl is found dead, her former friend haunted by their broken relationship joins the lead investigator to uncover the truth, only to reveal the terrifying murder that had happened.

The role

Liam: Liam is tall and brunette, Liam speaks with confidence and has a very big ego, when speaking to Emily he is excited and can let the confident facade fall he’s happy and giggly.

If you would like to audition or want more details, please email [meganmjenkins2009@gmail.com](mailto:meganmjenkins2009@gmail.com) and I will send you a section of the script.

Kind regards, Megan and Oscar

Seeking two actors F (45-60) and M (35-40) - amateur, non professional, semi pro etc. fine - in Stroud area for Rehearsed Reads for a Fringe production running this summer in L&SW. We've cast the play, but will be opportunity for future performances if you're a good fit.  🤩

Any interest please DM me or email perilofyouthplay@gmail.com

items.text:
Came across this and thought it was worth sharing since a lot of people ask about legit acting training 👀

It’s a **trial acting class from Green Room Acting Studio**, and there’s been a lot of really strong feedback around it. Everyone who’s taken it seems to have a great experience, which is honestly rare to see consistently.

It’s $55 and you can pick your own class time and coach, so there’s flexibility and no pressure to commit long term right away.

What stands out is that the coaches are actual industry professionals. People working out of LA, New York, Atlanta, Miami, not just teaching but actively involved in the industry. Names like David Wenzel, Barry Shapiro, Ricki Maslar, and Ani Avetyan.

Also, the fact that it’s online makes it even better. No need to relocate or move cities just to access that level of training. It’s all accessible from wherever you are.

It’s also known as one of the largest online platforms for acting training right now, so the trial class seems like a solid way to explore it.

If anyone’s been looking into acting classes, this might be worth checking out.

items.text:
🎶 Offering Free Voice Lessons in West Hollywood! 🎶

Hi! I’m Colleen, owner of Virtuoso Studios. I’ve personally built a team of exceptional music teachers, and I’m excited to introduce the newest member of our team while offering free trial lessons for new students!

Kelly Vargas is a Los Angeles-based singer, songwriter, and music teacher with a blend of pop, R&B, and Latin influences. As a bilingual artist (English/Spanish), she brings a modern, expressive style into both her music and teaching.

Her music has been featured on platforms like Netflix and Peacock, and she teaches voice, piano, and guitar to students of all ages and levels!

Kelly’s teaching style is supportive, engaging, and creative. She focuses on building strong technique, confidence, and helping each student find their unique voice. Lessons are available in Los Angeles or virtual.

Try a free lesson with Kelly today! Fill out the form here: [www.virtuosostudios.org/free-trial-lessons](http://www.virtuosostudios.org/free-trial-lessons)

Riverbend hits Alamo Drafthouse Cinema Cedars for Weird Wednesday — Wednesday, April 29 at 9:30PM.

A long-lost Black independent classic, newly restored from the original 35mm, returns to the big screen. Starring Steve James and Margaret Avery, this is raw, political, and built for an audience.

CASTING CALL – LOS ANGELES ⚽️
Looking for a male soccer player (age 18–30) with a slightly Lionel Messi/ rugged look and some basic acting ability.

📍 Location: Los Angeles  

📅 Date: May 2nd (coming up fast)  

⏰ Duration: Full day   

💵 Pay: $300  

This is for a vertical project — must be comfortable on camera and able to play soccer naturally.

🚨 URGENT CASTING — need to lock this in ASAP.

If interested, DM me right away with:

- Name  

- Age  

- Recent photos  

- acting and soccer Reels are MUST 

Serious inquiries only. Let’s make something great.

Kære medlem, Vi har filtreret inaktive medlemmer, og vi vil gøre det igen, så hvis du ser dette opslag, så sig noget for at blive i gruppen. Tak.
Cremeret agurke- og rejesalat
Ingredienser:
Til salaten:
450 g kogte rejer, pillede og rensede
2 store agurker, tyndt skåret
2,5 dl cherrytomater, halverede
Jeg elsker denne hurtige og nemme opskrift. Sig venligst noget verbalt for at blive ved med at modtage mine opskrifter.. Tak..
Opskrift i (c.o.m.m.e.n.t)…....

items.text:
**CALL FOR VOICES: Immigrant Actors in the UK**

Hi everyone! I’m an anthropology master’s student at UCL working on a creative research project.

I’m looking to better understand the lived experience of immigrant actors in the UK.  If you’re an international actor aged 18+, I’d really love to hear your perspective!

To take part, you just answer three simple questions.
Even a few lines is enough.

No pressure - it can be raw, messy, poetic, funny, honest. You can respond in writing or via voice note, and you can choose to remain anonymous.

You’re also invited (completely optional) to share something creative that captures your experience - a poem, photo, drawing, monologue, dance, or anything else.

**That’s it.**

Your response will become part of a multivoiced digital artwork / exhibition built from real lived experiences.

If you’d like to take part, please follow the link below.
items.title: Voices from Another Stage🎤
items.groupTitle: Casting Connect UK (Actors, Filmmakers, Casting Directors)

items.text: Die Musikerin und Sängerin Eva Piazza singt zusammen mit ihrem Bruder Yoann Piazza wieder im Lindenhof Theater Braunschweig. Auf dem Programm stehen französische Chansons nicht nur von Edith Piaf. Das Konzert findet am 18. Mai um 19.30 Uhr im Lindenhof Theater in Braunschweig statt. Die Karten gibt es hier https://lindenhof-braunschweig.de/veranstaltung/eva-piazza-singt-franzoesische-chansons-nicht-nur-von-edith-piaf-2-teil und bei der Konzertkasse und bei Musikalien Bartels und an der Abendkasse.

sharedPost.text:
Der Kino Mittwoch auf radioYpsilon 

MOVIETIME KW 16/2026

EIN KULTFILM IM ULTIMATE CUT, DIE INDOGENE BEVÖLKERUNG IM AMAZONAS UND MUMIENHORROR

Quentin Tarantinos Blutoper KILL BILL lief vor mehr als 20 Jahren in 2 Teilen, anno 2026 gibt's ein Revival in Form eines Filmes. 

Auf die Spuren des einheimischen Volkes begibt sich Richard Ladkani in YANUNI, DIE STIMME DES AMAZONAS. Wir konnten mit dem Regisseur der Doku ein Gespräch führen.

Universal Horror der 1930er Jahre anno 2026? Ja, das gibt es, wie stylisch die Neuinterpretation von Warner Bros ist (THE MUMMY), erzählt Ihnen unsere Moderatorin. 

Musikalisch gibt's neben der neuen Single von Shakira natürlich die beste Musik aus 90 Jahren Filmgeschichte. 

Mittwoch 15.4.2026 von 18 bis 19h auf radioYpsilon 94.5 oder via Stream (http://mp3.radioypsilon.at:8000/)

🎭 BEYOND BORDERS – International Residency  

📍 Krakow, Poland  

📅 May 18–23, 2026  

A free advanced training + creative residency for performers and multidisciplinary artists 🌍

⏰ Deadline: April 25, 2026

#OpenCall #ArtistResidency #BeyondBorders

Masz głos, którego świat jeszcze nie usłyszał? A może po prostu chcesz spróbować czegoś nowego?

Zapraszamy na warsztaty dubbingu, gdzie poznasz kulisy pracy lektora, nagrasz własne kwestie i poczujesz się jak w prawdziwym studiu nagraniowym! 🎧

Nie musisz mieć doświadczenia – liczy się chęć i dobra zabawa!
Przyjdź, odkryj swój talent i przeżyj coś wyjątkowego ✨

URGENT CASTING CALL - SPEAKING - PAID - NON-UNION

Role: Firefighter (Supporting actor, male, 20-40 years old, any ethnicity). Must look in-shape.

The role involves two lines of dialogue and doing chest compressions during a cardiac arrest call. This requires some physical fitness/cardio.

Location: East Vancouver

Shoot date: Tuesday April 21st, 7am-2pm

Rate: $150 honorarium (this is a self-funded independent short)

Submission Instructions:

Please email the following to reka.shikli@gmail.com

- Recent full-body photo and headshot

- Any relevant experience, acting reel or footage (optional)

-Subject line: TIYLC Firefighter

topComments.text: I’ll forward this to my agent, we have SAE Firefighters and Paramedics on staff

items.text:
Hey gang!!

So I've been working on a little project and I'd love to invite you all to come check it out!

This year I partnered with two incredible film makers, Seamus Birmingham and Jake Unger, to create a documentary about the school Pax attends The Rocky Mountain School of Expeditionary Learning - RMSEL. The fellas have done all the hard work, I just pointed at people and said, "ooo! they'd be good to talk to!" 

What they have created looks incredible and I could not be more proud!

We are having a big "red carpet" premiere/screening on May 28th at The People's Building. This will also be a fundraiser for both the school and the film to be submitted to festivals and what not. 

If you don't already know, this school is one of the most remarkable learning environments, but it is severly underfunded. It is not a charter or private school. It is a public school of choice governed by a BOCES board. As such, it does not recieve any bond or mill levy money that other schools (including charters) are allotted. This leaves us fighting for every dollar while providing a world class education and experiences of a lifetime to students. 

The film is titled, In The Absence of Shelter. Tickets will be available for purchase through The People's Building or at the door. $5 student and faculty $20 general public. [https://www.thepeoplesbuilding.com/about-us](https://www.thepeoplesbuilding.com/about-us)

The premiere is May 28th, 2026
Doors open at 6:00
Film is approximately 60 min run time
We will have a talk back afterwards with the film makers, students and faculty
The People's Building 
9995 E. Colfax
Aurora CO 80010

Hope to see youn there!! We would LOVE to get some press and local politicians in the room, so please share! Thanks!!!

items.text:
Now casting for "The Hero Complex."

A heartfelt short film about a superhero discovering self-care for the first time. For all of us who feel like the weight of the world is too much to carry.

Production Title: The Hero Complex

Genre: Drama

Production Type: Indie

Run Time: 10 minutes

Compensation: $400 flat.

Union/Non-Union Status: Open to either

Audition Information: Virtual/Self Tape

Shooting Schedule:

● Rehearsals Saturday, 5/23

● Shoot Sunday 5/24 & Monday 5/25 (holiday)

Shooting Location: Broomfield, CO

Email: herocomplexshortfilm@gmail.com

Character Breakdowns:

CLARK | Male | 28–35

Classic Superman archetype. Tall (5'10" +), black hair (or willing to dye), athletic build. Genuine physical presence, but with a mild-mannered, slightly awkward civilian side. Equal parts everyman and hero.

Please send your resume to herocomplexshortfilm@gmail.com, and, upon request, I'll email you the attached side. Self-tape by Friday, April 17th.

sharedPost.text: Mittsommer Konzert im Lindenhof Theater in Braunschweig. Am 15. Juni spielt Violin Virtuose und Konzertmeister Johannes Denhoff zusammen mit der von ihm gegründeten und geleiteten Lindenhofkapelle das diesjährige Mittsommer Konzert um 19.30 Uhr. Auf dem Programm steht unter anderem die Pastorale von Ludwig van Beethoven. Karten gibt es bei der Konzertkasse und bei Musikalien Bartels und an der Abendkasse oder im Internet unter https://www.eventim.de/event/mittsommer-konzert-theater-im-lindenhof-21176192/?srsltid=AfmBOoq5EEZ9rUIRGNAV_Q9tNLUTU7GeF93HkbE-xNgUF849FgJFA1z-
